zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Erleigh於大約1315年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦諾斯 奧肯登時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Zouche39歲，母親Elizabeth of Wokingham8歲。她於大約1329年與Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1382年在她的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦諾斯 奧肯登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Erleigh于大约1315年出生在英国英格兰倫敦諾斯 奧肯登时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Zouche39岁，母亲Elizabeth of Wokingham8岁。她于大约1329年与Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1382年在她的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦諾斯 奧肯登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Earley
meanings: English and Irish (Leitrim and Tyrone): variant of   Early  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Erleigh was born about 1315, in North Ockendon, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Nicholas Zouche, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth of Wokingham, was 8. She married Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz about 1329, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1382, in her hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in North Ockendon, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor d’Erleigh est née environ 1315, à North Ockendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas Zouche, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Wokingham, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz environ 1329, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à North Ockendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Erleigh um 1315 in North Ockendon, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Zouche 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth of Wokingham 8. Sie hat um 1329 in London, England Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1382 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in North Ockendon, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Erleigh è nata il circa 1315 nel North Ockendon, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Zouche, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth of Wokingham, aveva 8 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz circa 1329, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a North Ockendon, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Erleighが約1315年にイギリスイギリスロンドンノース オクエンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Zoucheは39歳，母Elizabeth of Wokinghamは8歳であった。約1329年にイギリスロンドンでSir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1382年に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンノース オクエンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Erleigh(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 노르스 옥켄던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Zouche(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth of Wokingham(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 대략 1329년 영국 런던에서 Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 노르스 옥켄던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Erleigh родилась около 1315 г. в местности норт оккендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Zouche было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Wokingham, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz около 1329 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1382 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности норт оккендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
